Uses of Class
com.irurueta.navigation.NavigationException

  • Packages that use NavigationException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation
    Contains general purpose classes for GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) / INS (Inertial Navigation System).
    com.irurueta.navigation.frames
    Contains frames to represent position, velocity and attitude within Earth.
    com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic
    Contains geodesic algorithms.
    com.irurueta.navigation.gnss  
    com.irurueta.navigation.indoor
    Contains structures to estimate positions and radio sources, as well as required measurements to make such estimations.
    com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.fingerprint
    Estimates positions and radio sources using fingerprints of WiFi/Beacons signals.
    com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.position
    Estimates positions using WiFi/Beacons signals.
    com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.radiosource
    Estimates radio sources using WiFi/Beacons signals.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial
    Contains inertial entities.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration
    Contains classes to perform calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes and magnetometers.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.navigators  
    com.irurueta.navigation.lateration
    Contains classes to estimate positions when intersecting cirles or spheres by using the lateration algorithm.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LockedException
      Exception raised when attempting to perform an operation on a locked instance because instance is busy doing some other operation.
      class  NotReadyException
      Exception raised when attempting to perform an operation when not ready.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.frames

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.frames 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  FrameException
      Exception related to frames.
      class  InvalidSourceAndDestinationFrameTypeException
      Exception raised if provided source and destination frame types of a coordinate transformation matrix is not valid for a given frame.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  GeodesicException
      Exception raised for a geodesic operation.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.gnss

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.gnss 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  GNSSException
      Exception related to GNSS estimation.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  IndoorException
      Exception raised if indoor fails.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.fingerprint

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.fingerprint 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  FingerprintEstimationException
      Base exception for this package.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.position

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.position 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  PositionEstimationException
      Exception raised if position estimation fails.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.radiosource

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.indoor.radiosource 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  RadioSourceEstimationException
      Exception raised if radio source estimation fails.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  InertialException
      Base exception for all inertial related exceptions.
      class  INSException
      Eception related to INS estimation when attempting to estimate position, velocity and attitude using inertial data.
      class  INSGNSSException
      Exception related to INS/GNSS estimation when attempting to estimate position, velocity and attitude using both satellite and inertial data.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  CalibrationException
      Exception raised when calibration fails.
      class  RandomWalkEstimationException
      Exception raised if random walk estimation fails.

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.navigators

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.navigators 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  InertialNavigatorException
      Exception raised when inertial navigation fails for some reason (typically, numerical instabilities).

    • Uses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.lateration

      Subclasses of NavigationException in com.irurueta.navigation.lateration 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LaterationException
      Exception raised if lateration fails.
